sections.paragraph:
- Original: ποτέ

- Transliteration: Pote

- Phonetic: pot-eh'

- Definition:

1. once i.e. formerly, aforetime, at some time

- Origin: from the base of G4225 and G5037

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech:

- Strong's: From the base of G4225 and G5037; indefinite adverb at some time ever: - afore- (any some-) time (-s) at length (the last) (+ n-) ever in the old time in time past once when.
